subcodes.title: Words to Breakwell, Hopper, Brittingham, spoken around 1901-09-04
subcodes.first_line: From this time, for the sake of the Blessed Perfection, you will endure many hardships; you will be persecuted severely; people will say bad things about you
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
